title: Operate basic machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate basic machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare basic machinery and equipment for use

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying and reporting potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant basic machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant basic machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant basic machinery and equipment operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Assess the work site and confirm the suitability of the machinery and equipment for the task

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to type of machinery and equipment to be operated and job requirements.

pcs.text: Conduct routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Replace and report damaged or worn components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace and report damaged or worn components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace and report damaged or worn components.

pcs.text: Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and site specific instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and site specific instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe safety rules and regulations, including site rules and site specific instructions.
